/usr/bin/clang++-18 -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/webrtc.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/webrtc.dir/webrtc_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webrtc.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webrtc.dir/src/ui/widget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webrtc.dir/src/net/Websocket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/webrtc.dir/src/core/core.cpp.o -o webrtc  -Wl,-rpath,/home/light/work/Video_Prj/QT_Prj/webrtc_26_3_3/webrtc/build/Desktop-Debug/3rdparty/libdatachannel: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 3rdparty/libdatachannel/libdatachannel.so.0.24.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
